title: platanthera oreades var. brachycentron
intro: Platanthera oreades var. brachycentron, also known as the Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a rare and endangered orchid species found in various parts of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Platanthera oreades var. brachycentron include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, and it is also sometimes added to salves and creams for topical application.
